name: Peach Cream Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Half & Half or Coffee Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the peaches and cut them in half, removing the stones.
2. Arrange the peach halves, cut side down, in an unbaked pie shell.
3. Mix together the sugar, flour, and cinnamon with the cream to make a paste.
4. Pour the mixture over the peaches.
5. Place the pie in a hot oven set to 450 degrees F.
6. Bake for 10 minutes or until the shell begins to brown.
7. Reduce the heat to moderate (350 degrees F.) and continue baking for another 30 minutes, or until the peaches are tender.
8. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
